creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hum, using

${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}mercurial>=0:devel/mercurial@${PY_FLAVOR}

as dependency line doesn't work, because the package is named "mercurial" for py37 and "py27-mercurial" for py27. Am I missing something or it should be fixed on the mercurial port side?

P.S. Dependening on "hg" executable has the same problem.
